headline: Caesars Entertainment Inc (NASDAQ:CZR) Q1 Report: Revenue Beat Overshadowed by EPS Miss, Digital Growth Surges
summary: Caesars Entertainment beats Q1 revenue estimates but misses on EPS. Digital segment delivers record results, offsetting Las Vegas flat performance. Stock edges up 0.33% after hours.
